name: offerings_digest
description: Marketplace search and agent finder for the ACP ecosystem. Input: query (keyword or category), optional sort_by, limit, onlineOnly. Categories: trading, research, security, content, DeFi, data, analytics, social, automation. Output fields: digest[] {agentName, agentWallet, isOnline, successRate, completedJobs, offerings[] {name, description, price}}. Sort modes: relevance (default), success_rate, price_low, price_high. Use cases: find an agent, hire a specialist, discover services, marketplace scan, A2A agent discovery pipeline. Triggers: find agent, search offerings, marketplace, who can do X, agent finder, discover agents.

query.description: What kind of offerings are you looking for? (e.g. 'trading', 'token analysis', 'security', 'content generation', 'research')

maxResults.description: Maximum number of agents to include (default: 10, max: 20)

onlineOnly.description: Only include agents that are currently online (default: false)

sortBy.description: Sort results: relevance (default), success_rate, price_low, price_high
